data.scene: User scans a Matter QR code or enters a manual pairing code to commission a new Matter smart home device.
data.purpose: Pair a Matter smart home device with the user's Home Assistant server for local smart home control.
data.source: User-entered commissioning code (QR code scan via camera or manual text input) and optional device PIN
data.item: Matter commissioning code (QR code payload / manual pairing code), device PIN, local IP address of the device being commissioned
data.frequency: On-demand (each time the user commissions a new Matter device)
data.storage: Not stored by the app; forwarded to the Home Assistant server for commissioning and discarded
data.recipient: Home Assistant server (user self-hosted) via WebSocket; Google Play Services for Matter framework operations
data.thirdparty: Google Play Services (Matter subsystem) prepares and manages the commissioning session; the commissioning payload is sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server only
data.switchpath: Settings -> Matter Commissioning (triggered from WebView frontend)

data.scene: User commissions a Matter device already on the local network by providing its device PIN and IP address.
data.purpose: Commission an existing network-connected Matter device by verifying its PIN and establishing it as a paired device in Home Assistant.
data.source: User-provided device PIN and local network IP address of the Matter device
data.item: Matter device setup PIN, local IP address
data.frequency: On-demand (each time the user commissions an on-network Matter device)
data.storage: Not stored by the app; forwarded to the Home Assistant server for commissioning and discarded
data.recipient: Home Assistant server (user self-hosted) via WebSocket
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; PIN and IP address are sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server only

permissions.name: CAMERA
permissions.scene: When user taps the QR code scan button to commission a Matter device
permissions.purpose: Scan the Matter device QR code to extract the commissioning code for device pairing
permissions.impact: If denied, the user must manually type the commissioning code instead of scanning the QR code

permissions.name: NEARBY_DEVICES (BLUETOOTH_SCAN / BLUETOOTH_CONNECT) / ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When commissioning a Matter device via Google Play Services Matter subsystem
permissions.purpose: Discover and connect to nearby Matter devices via Bluetooth LE for the commissioning process
permissions.impact: If denied, Matter device discovery via BLE may not function correctly; the user may need to enter the device IP address manually
